Localization.Description: A user changed a logging level or a level of generated events

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.name} changed the level of generated events received from the connection control module on a client from "{object.value}" to "{object.new_value}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} changed the logging level of the events received from devices from "{object.value}" to "{object.new_value}" on host {event_src.host}
